title: Display Elite Properties logo image before company name in Navbar

requirements.summary: Add Elite Properties logo with gold-to-silver gradient ring border in Navbar before company name text
acceptanceCriteria: The Elite Properties logo image appears in the navbar immediately to the left of the company name text.
The logo uses the same image source (elite-logo.dim_300x300.png) and the same gold-to-silver gradient ring/border style as the one displayed on the FeaturedCommercialCard.
The logo is sized appropriately for the navbar (approximately 40–48px) and is vertically centered with the company name.
The company name text 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' remains visible, deep black (#111111), bold, and to the right of the logo.
The navbar layout does not break on desktop or mobile viewports.

file_operations.description: Add an element referencing frontend/public/assets/generated/elite-logo.dim_300x300.png immediately before the company name text 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant'. Apply the same gold-to-silver gradient ring border styling (using box-shadow or CSS gradient ring in #C9A84C / #A8A8A8 tones) that is currently used on the logo in the FeaturedCommercialCard component. Size the logo to approximately 40x40 or 48x48px with appropriate CSS classes. Ensure the logo and company name are wrapped in a flex container with vertical alignment (items-center) so they sit side-by-side. Verify the layout remains responsive on both desktop and mobile viewports, and that the mobile hamburger menu continues to function correctly.
